tagline: Fakafeituʻu hoʻo repo ʻi he tukupa kotoa pe.

hero.title: Malo e lelei ʻi he lea fakafonua kotoa pe
hero.lede: ʻOku liliu ʻa e peesi ko ʻeni ʻe he Resource Translator, ʻi he teke kotoa pe ki he main, ki he lea fakafonua kotoa pe ʻoku poupouʻi ʻe he Azure AI Translator.

phrases.welcome: ʻOku talitali lelei koe ki he Resource Translator.
phrases.machine_translated: Liliu fakamisini ʻe he Azure AI Translator.
phrases.open_pull_request: Fakaava ha pull request mo ha ngaahi liliu foʻou.
phrases.ship_anywhere: Fakafolau hoʻo polokalama fakakomipiuta ki ha feituʻu pe ʻi he mamani.
phrases.thank_you: Fakamalo atu ʻi hoʻo ʻahiʻahiʻi ʻa e Resource Translator.

features.fast: Liliu ʻa e ngaahi maʻuʻanga tokoni ʻi ha lau sekoni.
features.reliable: Takai ʻi he byte kotoa pe ʻo hoʻo ngaahi faile maʻuʻanga tokoni.
features.configurable: Ongo, ngaueʻanga, glossary, lea kovi — configurable kotoa.
features.ci_native: Fokotuʻutuʻu ki he GitHub Actions mo e pull-request workflows.

footer.powered_by: Fakalele ʻe he Resource Translator mo e Azure AI Translator.
footer.view_translation_pr: Vakai ki he kole toʻo ʻo e liliu fakamuimuitaha.
